subcodes.first_line: O thou youth ablaze with the fire of God's love! Thy sister and brother-in-law have arrived in the Holy Land and have been perfumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشاب المشتعل بنار محبه الله قد حضرت شقیقتک و صهرک فی ارض المقدسه و تعطر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
